episodes.title: #42 Crazy Cat Cult Lady: Sheryl Ruthven and the Cult of Eva's Eden
episodes.description: What if your church asked you to adopt 30 cats in the name of god? Sheryl Ruthven is obsessed with control and attention, so what's a girl to do?! Start a cult of course! Enter Freedom Fire Ministries. This cult has it all! Having her followers pray for her ex-husbands death. Even an alleged murder plot! This is the most bizarre cult you've never heard of. Starring 30 cats per household, sounds cozy...til the smell hits! Join us as Hayley takes us on a wild cat-crazy ride!! Sources: https://www.hbomax.com/shows/curious-case-of/s1/61a59a72-d476-49a8-9cbd-2c49741b423f/e6-doomsday-cat-cult/ca3717af-9e6f-4e7c-b25c-cd30ed26a566 Message us! Hello spooky crew! Our tote bag drawing is officially closed, and we just want to say a massive thank-you to everyone who entered. We're so grateful for the love and support! Missed the tote? No worries, we are still sending out high-quality vinyl stickers while supplies last. Just email us proof of your rating and review along with your mailing address to thespookydarlings.gmail.com, and we will get one headed your way. And, just to put your mind at ease, we promise you There's still time to get a Spooky Darlings sticker. Just email us proof of your rating and review to thespookydarlings@gmail.com. Bummed about missing out on the tote? We've got you! Treat yourself to a perusal of our merch store at thespookydarlings.printful.me. You deserve it! Thanks for listening to The Spooky Darlings! If you have a creepy, strange, or cool story you would like to share email us at thespookydarlings@gmail.com. Follow us on instagram and TikTok @thespookydarlingspodcast for more! Peruse our merch store at https://thespookydarlings.printful.me/
